quality.rationale: 利用Ricci恒等式、Riemann张量循环对称性与Killing方程进行多步张量推导，逻辑链条完整且具有一般流形普适性

origin.question: 10.7. If $\pmb{\xi}$ is a Killing vector, prove that$$\xi_{\mu ; \alpha \beta} = \mathsf {R}_{\gamma \beta \alpha \mu} \xi^{\gamma}.$$
origin.solution: ## SolutionSolution 10.7. For any vector $\xi$$$\xi_{\sigma ; \rho \mu} - \xi_{\sigma ; \mu \rho} = \mathrm {R}_{\sigma \rho \mu}^{\lambda} \xi_{\lambda} \tag {1}$$by the definition of $\mathbf{R}_{\alpha \beta \gamma} \delta$ . Add to Equation (1) its two permutations and use the cyclic identity for the Riemann tensor$$\mathbf {R}_{\sigma \rho \mu}^{\lambda} + \mathbf {R}_{\mu \sigma \rho}^{\lambda} + \mathbf {R}_{\rho \mu \sigma}^{\lambda} = 0$$to obtain the identity$$0 = \xi_{\sigma ; \rho \mu} - \xi_{\sigma ; \mu \rho} + \xi_{\mu ; \sigma \rho} - \xi_{\mu ; \rho \sigma} + \xi_{\rho ; \mu \sigma} - \xi_{\rho ; \sigma \mu}. (2).$$For a Killing vector, Equation (2) becomes$$0 = \xi_{\sigma ; \rho \mu} - \xi_{\sigma ; \mu \rho} - \xi_{\mu ; \rho \sigma}, (3),$$and substituting Equation (3) into Equation (1), one obtains$$\xi_{\mu ; \rho \sigma} = \mathrm {R}_{\sigma \rho \mu}^{\lambda} \xi_{\lambda}. \tag {4}.$$
